title: Bone Blocks
description: This mod improves bones by adding new blocks and crafts.
body:
![Bone Blocks Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81a9b92e79ef2061ea9dfd07df21b858f5faa7f0.png)

##

This mod adds new crafts and blocks related to bones.

<details>
<summary>Blocks</summary>
  
- Polished Bone Block _(stairs, wall and slab included)_
- Bone Bricks _(stairs, wall and slab included)_
- Cracked Bone Bricks
- Big Skeleton Skull
  - Can be equipped in the head slot
- Bone Fence
- Fragile Bone Block
  - Breaks when a player or entity steps on it without a supporting block below
</details>

<details>
<summary>New crafts</summary>

- Skeleton Skull can be recrafted into 22 bones
- Bone Block can be crafted with 4 bones
- Big Skeleton Skull

![Big Skeleton Skull recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/057a5505da56c07ae854165e52ab696428a39803.png)
- Polished Bone Block -> Bone Bricks -> Cracked Bone Bricks

![Polished Bone Block recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43838ccb4d0eb45718b7069ee94f2ceb761933df.png)

![Bone Bricks recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/847f53290c543f74eb14aa3be1149c41547d0d58.png)

![ Cracked Bone Bricks recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/172196c6dc1fcb374210c1cba0c4e404f85a866e.png)
- Fragile Bone Block

![Fragile Bone Block recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8fc66032d631f888d81b3b2c59b00849508005a.png)
- Bone Fence

![Bone Fence recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2840df340c70006c83167eb88cfdff296ef14083.png)
</details>

![Screenshot with all new blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/471d0bd9494c44c249004784537b9585a96a74db.jpeg)
